title: Blaze-ing Fast
description: A modpack that aims to load everything blazing fast, with startup, to world, to save and exit, to desktop, in less than even 25s
body:
# Blaze-ing Fast
A modpack with only **_21(!)_** mods (at the time of writing) that focuses on getting you in your game without wasting any time.
# Performance
1. Holds a smooth 100~ fps on tested computer in singleplayer game
2. Boots superfast thanks to the underrated dashloader
3. Enters and quits also super fast thanks to fastquit and Ksyxis
# Contact
If you wish to contact me feel free to do so on maybe.asdf on discord for any inquires
# Tested computer specs
- i5-1235U
- Linux Mint 22.1 Cinnamon
- Iris Xe Graphics
- 16GB Ram
